  • Uses of HttpPartSerializer in org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header with parameters of type HttpPartSerializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SerializedHeader
    SerializedHeader.serializer(HttpPartSerializer value)
    Sets the serializer to use for serializing the value to a string value.

  • Uses of HttpPartSerializer in org.apache.juneau.http.remote

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.remote that return HttpPartSerializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpPartSerializer
    RrpcInterfaceMeta.getPartSerializer()
    Returns the interface-level custom HttpPartSerializer, or null if none.
    HttpPartSerializer
    RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.getPartSerializer()
    Returns the method-level custom HttpPartSerializer, or null if none.
    static HttpPartSerializer
    RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.resolvePartSerializer(Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> c)
    Resolves an HttpPartSerializer class declared on an HttpPartMarshalling annotation to a cached instance, or returns null for the HttpPartSerializer.Void sentinel (or a null class).
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.http.remote with type arguments of type HttpPartSerializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HttpPartSerializer
    RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.resolvePartSerializer(Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> c)
    Resolves an HttpPartSerializer class declared on an HttpPartMarshalling annotation to a cached instance, or returns null for the HttpPartSerializer.Void sentinel (or a null class).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<HttpPartSerializer>
    ResponseBeanMeta.getPartSerializer()
    Returns the part serializer to use to serialize this response.
    Optional<HttpPartSerializer>
    RequestBeanPropertyMeta.getSerializer()
    Returns the serializer to use for serializing the bean property value.
    Optional<HttpPartSerializer>
    ResponseBeanPropertyMeta.getSerializer()
    Returns the serializer to use for serializing the bean property value.

    Subinterfaces of HttpPartSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    HttpPartSerializer.Void
    Represent "no" part part serializer.
    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart that implement HttpPartSerializer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BaseHttpPartSerializer
    Base class for implementations of HttpPartSerializer
    class 
    SimplePartSerializer
    An implementation of HttpPartSerializer that simply serializes everything using Object.toString().

    Class
    Description
    class 
    OpenApiSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to values suitable for transmission as HTTP headers, query/form-data parameters, and path variables.

  • Uses of HttpPartSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon that implement HttpPartSerializer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to UON (a notation for URL-encoded query parameter values).
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Encoding
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().encoding().build();.
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().ws().build();.

  • Uses of HttpPartSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding that implement HttpPartSerializer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to URL-encoded notation with UON-encoded values (a notation for URL-encoded query paramter values).
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Expanded
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().expandedParams().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.PlainText
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().plainTextParts().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().useWhitespace().build();.
